competitors.name: Dan Lok - High Ticket Closer
competitors.offer: High Ticket Closer Certification + Inner Circle mastermind
competitors.notes: Heavy YouTube presence. Shifted toward certification model. Large affiliate network drives traffic. Weaker on personalized coaching, stronger on brand recognition.

competitors.name: Myron Golden - Offer Mastery
competitors.notes: Challenge model converts well. Strong organic social proof from live events. Focuses on offer creation rather than full business coaching. Appeals to faith-based audience.

competitors.name: Cole Gordon - Remote Closing Academy
competitors.notes: Direct competitor in the closer training space. Strong case studies. Recently expanded into agency-side training. Younger demographic. Fast-growing YouTube channel.

competitors.name: Hormozi - Skool / Acquisition.com
competitors.offer: Free community + portfolio company growth partnerships
competitors.notes: Not direct competitor but pulls attention from same audience. Free content strategy pressures paid models. Skool community platform gaining traction. Different business model but overlapping ICP.
